
 
 
## *************particleSwarm-volume multiple3-mean: resultFilemultiple3*************** ##
 
 
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
fig = plt.figure()
ax = fig.add_subplot(111, projection='3d')
p = 0.2
SNR = 15
N = 20
f = 10
bounds = np.array([[-1000, -1000, -300, -300, -300],[1000, 1000, 300, 300, 300]])
optimization_options = {'swarm_size': 400, 'c1': 1.5, 'c2': 2, 'w': 0.1, 'k': 80, 'p': 2, 'niter': 1000, 'ftol': 0.001, 'ftol_iter': 20}
Energy = 0.08373447169368724
e2 = 64.12*np.array([0.8660254037844386,0.5,0.0])
e1 = 64.12*np.array([0.8660254037844386,-0.5,0.0])
e3 = 536.35*np.array([0.8660254037844386,0.5,0.0])
e4 = 536.35*np.array([0.8660254037844386,-0.5,0.0])
FinalState = np.array([567.3803877482585, -92.81466029671253, -13.20268532947549, -171.23264297144533, 108.44550707164663, -742.8460836018843, 387.372317975169, -36.800658705159975, -106.64948021088465, -176.887333941201, 428.7749155085216, -453.6050433954602, 99.19921635926532, -148.84078051863705, -111.41941027276334, 596.4371015055954, 359.9046585728376, -153.28586862002425, 89.25747601624178, -65.49728645874833, 284.84014249267955, 4.6800425970544115, 145.13735593746182, 44.60540316347395, -140.81021762544154, 141.4466405882376, 232.20549240920965, -20.752767879995247, -189.30854479159714, 43.278609873488264, 721.0673577800428, 319.13695001252125, 119.79789141613601, 40.05850973885198, -69.12382543252049, 118.63473109928124, 64.76234546144597, -5.878201597290525, 151.50942660960987, -120.69615721976669, 711.4871194748441, 516.4610701241853, 132.28961913294108, -6.584002059904925, -191.0374421427962, 484.7625029128514, -241.13015705088506, -237.68260536580425, -11.942727731137953, 210.37145454438027, 462.70984742394234, 39.73403733222983, 197.37026159975466, -4.5818232005605495, -114.84104284895344, 103.24801828508083, -61.98766780315682, -164.1028436805725, 209.8024047406992, 92.94274341332456, 636.857325738656, -193.81599467962116, 113.68548787691306, -97.09804423709839, -8.177380260695431, 96.49265475088775, -170.43461991892323, -254.37918330203723, -33.69471852801258, 118.61829878734643, 176.19273810897155, -306.3582790892307, -135.66558751601, 204.78403696711885, 59.0232402250852, 286.73353452853956, 179.5286262763094, 164.497968702363, -194.44140578520833, -35.315163631528506, 638.4946400127159, 202.02257605114042, -184.70632967837457, 141.57069543391887, -42.691363984808746, 436.3705111318592, 254.91467602068315, 28.979606918863322, -14.445391669748636, 206.61409202348474, 566.3462842253357, -297.7334822928514, 163.73268470515904, 43.22901340329794, -155.4027933240625, 282.1391945864327, -137.46853441450833, -57.90846795271835, 224.3536643711616, 38.48122173284731])
FinalState = FinalState.reshape(N, 3)
ax.scatter(FinalState[:,0], FinalState[:,1], FinalState[:,2], c='g', marker='o')
ax.scatter(e1[0],e1[1],e1[2], c='r', marker='o')
ax.scatter(e2[0],e2[1],e2[2], c='r', marker='o')
ax.scatter(e3[0],e3[1],e3[2], c='r', marker='o')
ax.scatter(e4[0],e4[1],e4[2], c='r', marker='o')
plt.plot([0,e4[0]], [0,e4[1]], '--', c='k')
plt.plot([0,e3[0]], [0,e3[1]], '--', c='k')
ax.set_xlabel('x'); ax.set_ylabel('y'); ax.set_zlabel('z')
ax.set_title('Energy=' + str(np.round(Energy, 4)))
plt.show()


#Finished in 34.81 minutes
 
 
## *************adam-volume multiple3-mean: resultFilemultiple3*************** ##
 
 
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
fig = plt.figure()
ax = fig.add_subplot(111, projection='3d')
p = 0.2
SNR = 15
N = 20
f = 10
bounds = np.array([[-1000, -1000, -300, -300, -300],[1000, 1000, 300, 300, 300]])
optimization_options = {'learning_rate': 1, 'max_steps': 10000, 'ftol': 0.0001, 'tolerance_steps': 200}
Energy = 0.058097723379533686
e2 = 64.12*np.array([0.8660254037844386,0.5,0.0])
e1 = 64.12*np.array([0.8660254037844386,-0.5,0.0])
e3 = 536.35*np.array([0.8660254037844386,0.5,0.0])
e4 = 536.35*np.array([0.8660254037844386,-0.5,0.0])
FinalState = np.array([612.9321980767592, -120.1042952016775, 7.2930381390781935, -180.37980229066778, 196.54440592842246, -697.0477397656464, 310.61458182820684, 258.2921592552522, 0.0012907827140933026, -257.8276984952552, 446.32231550351645, -475.09809396128986, 152.25492564636116, -146.15889538855114, 3.0072158948145895, 384.0447715765537, 446.9935561585984, -240.9754200211326, 164.3572186446086, -19.6762191218291, 196.5218152848718, -25.927704680190814, 187.1993746619117, 2.165060321023403, -184.7561157008489, 187.25360855521274, 271.8502776639262, -14.099517470474321, -186.08335275163728, 159.3445707223571, 562.7296218201619, 328.0353955046582, 158.88685262970102, -150.83412957529328, -259.7179431909152, 73.67055470058129, 199.00994995671144, -5.491778194821096, 139.16521898668054, -157.07537652356257, 511.2594274346041, 461.8352734095594, 139.78915535418443, -2.8495302420943447, -121.43293956300532, 488.2310154086308, -283.74809385280446, -229.57692622345084, 0.40328593126432966, 231.72200045029132, 324.38320825307426, -45.04774446503439, 106.92709716667143, -7.056078501125779, -127.44392943322784, 68.82879366671206, 55.565749096985286, -166.125811598186, 165.91664266851657, -1.6590367671116544, 641.3848697202059, -254.92139610896535, 166.49373508816254, -167.19508964010296, -1.5314978537868016, 59.1220264073818, -106.1431592847256, -162.3225626089647, -1.8748071197093104, 160.6993272227999, 95.8775078744796, -292.6090921065683, -163.72029150413698, 146.84628993140296, -9.94295940582753, 246.55273421373292, 111.04684640940552, 185.97154963131095, -209.4290289598611, -10.378206793709273, 634.3657763021671, 181.75696471781782, -131.98001286373253, 150.70419559282283, 6.1310393562201435, 491.70172572640354, 300.93364958949815, 18.09413228188626, 18.094105602284706, 231.68215295118253, 557.9653799438249, -387.257387743437, 148.17242721317788, -5.7977214559161565, -155.36586700524205, 233.10401529873155, -180.33730761536307, -197.8985329569521, 194.65649856137696, -2.098054114769979])
FinalState = FinalState.reshape(N, 3)
ax.scatter(FinalState[:,0], FinalState[:,1], FinalState[:,2], c='g', marker='o')
ax.scatter(e1[0],e1[1],e1[2], c='r', marker='o')
ax.scatter(e2[0],e2[1],e2[2], c='r', marker='o')
ax.scatter(e3[0],e3[1],e3[2], c='r', marker='o')
ax.scatter(e4[0],e4[1],e4[2], c='r', marker='o')
plt.plot([0,e4[0]], [0,e4[1]], '--', c='k')
plt.plot([0,e3[0]], [0,e3[1]], '--', c='k')
ax.set_xlabel('x'); ax.set_ylabel('y'); ax.set_zlabel('z')
ax.set_title('Energy=' + str(np.round(Energy, 4)))
plt.show()


#Finished in 3.78 minutes
